title: Sjögren's syndrome - NHS
text:
Sjögren's syndrome can be a difficult condition to live with, both physically and emotionally.
As well as support from your doctor, you may find it helpful to get support from other people with the condition, either at a local support group or online.
There are also national charities that can offer support and information.
Sjögren's UK Information and support for anyone affected by Sjögren's syndrome.
Website: www.sjogrensuk.org Helpline: 0121 478 1133 Arthritis UK Information and support for people affected by arthritis and related conditions, including Sjögren's syndrome.
Website: www.arthritis.uk.org Helpline: 0800 5200 520 Arthritis UK: Sjögren's disease Arthritis UK: online community
